name: Free Cloud Computing Services - AWS Free Tier
snippet: When you create a new AWS Free Tier account, you get $100 in credits immediately. As you explore key services, you can earn up to $100 more.

name: Free Trial and Free Tier Services and Products - Google Cloud

name: Developer Tool Pricing Strategy: From Free Tier to Enterprise Contracts
